description: Add JUnit 5 tests to the Calculator project (~/eclipse-workspace/calculator/) in Eclipse IDE. Create a test class named 'CalculatorTest.java' at src/test/java/com/example/calculator/CalculatorTest.java to verify the add(), subtract(), multiply(), and divide() methods of the Calculator class. Include a test for the division-by-zero edge case using assertThrows(ArithmeticException.class, ...) and ensure all tests pass.
